case_title: BRENDA LANDA ET AL VS. MARK ARMOUR

ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-16-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF BRENDNA LANDA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARK ARMOUR IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST A CONTINUANCE TO ALLOW FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-11-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,386.83 FILED BY LANDA, BRENDA ORTIZ, MARIAH AS TO DEFENDANT ARMOUR, MARK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED NOV-30-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARMOUR, MARK

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-22-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFFS BRENDA LANDA AND MARIA ORTIZ ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARK ARMOUR IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $714.00 IS REACHED. DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY PLAINTIFF THROUGH VENMOOR OTHER FORM OF ELECTRONIC PAYMENT. A PROGRESS REPORT DATE HAS BEEN SET FOR FEBRUARY 14, 2022, AT 3:30 P.M. NO APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED IF PAYMENT IS MADE AS AGREED AND THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS SETTLED. IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED, APPEARANCES ARE REQUIRED, AND JUDGEMENT WILL BE ISSUED. COURT MAY CONSIDER PUNITIVE DAMAGES AT THE NEXT HEARING IF PAYMENT IS NOT MADE AS AGREED. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS SUBMITTED FOR REVIEW BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
